summary: Comprehensive testing of P1 features: Drink Reveal (public daily mystery drop), Staff order-status workflow with optimistic UI + filter chips + cancel, and dormant Twilio SMS. 15/15 backend pytest tests PASS. Frontend Drink Reveal tap-to-reveal + countdown + CTA works flawlessly. Staff Dashboard for Sam shows 4 filter cards + 5 orders + working optimistic Advance + Cancel + filter chips + stock side panel. Auth is COOKIE-based (session_token), confirmed working across 4 staff + customer + master_admin + super_admin.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_orders.py line 225: SMS only fires if customer.phone is truthy — that means the '[SMS dormant] would send to ...' log line will NOT appear for customers without a phone on file. Acceptance bullet wording ('verify backend logs SMS dormant') may not always be observable in dev, but PATCH never raises (verified). Consider also logging at the call-site when SMS is skipped due to missing phone, for observability.

Login response does not include a token in JSON body — auth is purely cookie-based (httponly session_token). This is fine but every external API consumer/test must use a requests.Session (or equivalent) to persist cookies. Documenting this in API docs would help.
drink-reveal/today: 2 sequential calls returned the same product_id (deterministic within UTC window) — matches spec.
OrderStatus PATCH returns 'tak assigned to you boss' for cross-staff attempts and 'Tak ada akses' for customers — Manglish localization is consistent and tests verify exact substrings.
test_credentials: Sam: sam@masterliqours.my/Staff123! (5 orders), Logen: logen@masterliqours.my/Staff123!, Mukesh & Sharvin: same pwd. Customer: customer1@test.com/Test123!. Master Admin: jojo@masterliqours.my/Admin123!. Super Admin: yash@masterliqours.my/Admin123!
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded staff + orders. Test mutated one order's status during PATCH tests and reverted it (set back to 'pending' via curl post-test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features pass end-to-end. Pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_p1_features.py uses requests.Session() for cookie-based auth — reuse this pattern for any future auth-gated tests. Drink Reveal product is deterministic per UTC day (today: Johnnie Walker Black Label, RM180 -> RM126). Sam's 5 orders are at /api/staff/my-orders. Frontend selectors are reliable: staff-filter-{status}, staff-order-{id}, staff-order-status-{id}, staff-advance-{id}, staff-cancel-{id}, drink-reveal-tap, drink-reveal-cta, drink-reveal-countdown.

verified_acceptance_criteria.drink_reveal_endpoint: PASS — available=true, discount_percentage=30, discounted_price=round(price*0.7,2), product+reveal_start+reveal_end present
verified_acceptance_criteria.drink_reveal_deterministic: PASS — same product_id on repeated calls
verified_acceptance_criteria.drink_reveal_ui_tap_to_reveal: PASS — blurred -> un-blurred on tap; product name/desc/price/discounted price all visible; countdown live (16h:21m:48s observed); CTA href=/product/{id}
verified_acceptance_criteria.my_orders: PASS — 5 orders for Sam, all with status field
verified_acceptance_criteria.my_stock: PASS — non-empty list (4+ items shown in UI: Johnnie Walker x50, Chivas Regal x10, Jack Daniels x10, Glenfiddich x10, Absolut x50)
verified_acceptance_criteria.patch_status_own_order_200: PASS — body matches {message:'Status updated', status:'preparing', order_id}
verified_acceptance_criteria.patch_status_cross_staff_403: PASS — 403 'Order ni tak assigned to you boss'
verified_acceptance_criteria.patch_twilio_dormant_no_raise: PASS — PATCH returns 200 with no Twilio env vars
verified_acceptance_criteria.optimistic_ui_advance: PASS — badge changed Confirmed -> Preparing immediately (before API), final state matched
verified_acceptance_criteria.cancel_dialog_and_removal: PASS — confirm() accepted, badge -> 'cancelled', advance & cancel buttons hidden after cancel
verified_acceptance_criteria.filter_chip_toggle: PASS — clicking confirmed filter -> 0 orders shown; clicking again -> all 5 restored
verified_acceptance_criteria.regression: PASS — /products, /orders/my-orders, master_admin login, super_admin login all 200
